query:
SELECT 
  u.id,
  u.username,
  u.fullName,
  u.role,
  u.isActive,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT up.permission) as permissions,
  GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT rp.permissionId) as rolePermissions
FROM users u
LEFT JOIN user_permissions up ON u.id = up.userId
LEFT JOIN user_roles ur ON u.id = ur.userId
LEFT JOIN role_permissions rp ON ur.roleId = rp.roleId
WHERE u.username = 'RADMAN'
GROUP BY u.id, u.username, u.fullName, u.role, u.isActive;
